name: Delve
description: Delve — Automated vendor security assessment platform generating shareable security profiles from questionnaire responses.

seo.title: Delve — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Delve: Delve — Automated vendor security assessment platform generating shareable security profiles from questionnaire responses.

when_to_use: Shareable security profile for customer trust reviews
Third-party risk assessment workflow for enterprise suppliers
Security posture benchmarking against industry peers
Evidence-based security rating for procurement decisions

pros: Shareable security profile cuts duplicate questionnaires
Saves sales engineers hours per deal cycle
Evidence linking to source controls improves credibility
cons: Value depends on prospects accepting the profile format
Young product with limited track record in enterprise deals
AI answers still need human review for accuracy
Pricing not published; expect quote-based sales
review.verdict: Promising questionnaire relief for revenue teams — the network effect will determine if it actually replaces spreadsheets.
review.best_for: B2B sales teams drowning in repetitive security questionnaires
review.not_for: Buyers in industries that demand bespoke questionnaire formats

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
